[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初八]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初八]] {{wikidata link|Q839617}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Matching pagename on wikidata]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh min nan:" to "zh-min-nan:"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839617]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 8|qq=May 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihisa|Shimazu Yoshihisa]] surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.
== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|qq=|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|qq=|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|7|5|9|4|8|6|5|0508|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihisa|Shimazu Yoshihisa]] surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.
== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|qq=|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|qq=|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihisa|Shimazu Yoshihisa]] surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.
== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|7|5|9|4|8|6|5|0508|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|7|5|9|4|8|6|5|0508|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839617]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 8|qq=May 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihisa|Shimazu Yoshihisa]] surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.
== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初八]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初八]] {{wikidata link|Q839617}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839617]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 8|qq=May 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihisa|Shimazu Yoshihisa]] surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.
== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).

== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|7|5|9|4|8|6|5|0508|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839617]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 8|qq=May 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihisa|Shimazu Yoshihisa]] surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.
== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihisa|Shimazu Yoshihisa]] surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.
== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|7|5|9|4|8|6|5|0508|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839617]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 8|qq=May 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihisa|Shimazu Yoshihisa]] surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.
== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|7|5|9|4|8|6|5|0508|qq=}}

== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).

revision.comment: Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839617]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 8|qq=May 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihisa|Shimazu Yoshihisa]] surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.
== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|7|5|9|4|8|6|5|0508|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

revision.comment: Add page with conflicting Wikidata QIDs
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839617]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 8|qq=May 8}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihisa|Shimazu Yoshihisa]] surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.
== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|7|5|9|4|8|6|5|0508|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihisa|Shimazu Yoshihisa]] surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.
== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|7|5|9|4|8|6|5|0508|qq=}}

== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|7|5|9|4|8|6|5|0508|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839617]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 8|qq=May 8}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihisa|Shimazu Yoshihisa]] surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.
== Births == * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:862|862]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Emperor Xizong of Tang|Emperor Xizong]], the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died [[:en:888|888]]). * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died [[:en:1771|1771]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:840|840]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Junna|Junwa Tennō]], the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:786|786]]). * [[:en:Chōtoku|Chōtoku]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:995|995]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara Michikane]], a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born [[:en:961|961]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born [[:en:1593|1593]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1662|1662]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – [[:en:Koxinga|Zheng Chenggong]] (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born [[:en:1624|1624]]). * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] [[:en:June 4|June 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1641|1641]]).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]]
{{Not to be confused with|May 8|qq=May 8}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōkyō}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20}}) – {{ill|Nitta Yoshisada|en|Nitta Yoshisada|WD=Q1328796|lt=Nitta Yoshisada}} launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1587|en|1587|WD=Q6744|lt=1587}} {{ill|June 13|en|June 13|WD=Q2614|lt=June 13}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshihisa|en|Shimazu Yoshihisa|WD=Q955727|lt=Shimazu Yoshihisa}} surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|WD=Q2627|lt=June 4}}) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.
== Births == * ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|862|en|862|WD=Q24993|lt=862}} {{ill|June 8|en|June 8|WD=Q2621|lt=June 8}}) – {{ill|Emperor Xizong of Tang|en|Emperor Xizong of Tang|WD=Q9889|lt=Emperor Xizong}}, the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died {{ill|888|en|888|WD=Q563006|lt=888}}). * {{ill|Genbun|en|Genbun|WD=Q1145754|lt=Genbun}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1737|en|1737|WD=Q6993|lt=1737}} {{ill|June 6|en|June 6|WD=Q2620|lt=June 6}}) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died {{ill|1771|en|1771|WD=Q7686|lt=1771}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōwa|en|Jōwa|WD=Q3577279|lt=Shōwa}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|840|en|840|WD=Q29936|lt=840}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|WD=Q2617|lt=June 11}}) – {{ill|Emperor Junna|en|Emperor Junna|WD=Q374136|lt=Junwa Tennō}}, the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|786|en|786|WD=Q30307|lt=786}}). * {{ill|Chōtoku|en|Chōtoku|WD=Q1327213|lt=Chōtoku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|995|en|995|WD=Q23794|lt=995}} {{ill|June 8|en|June 8|WD=Q2621|lt=June 8}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michikane|en|Fujiwara no Michikane|WD=Q366253|lt=Fujiwara Michikane}}, a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born {{ill|961|en|961|WD=Q23881|lt=961}}). * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born {{ill|1593|en|1593|WD=Q6772|lt=1593}}). * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567}}). * ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1662|en|1662|WD=Q7574|lt=1662}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|WD=Q2668|lt=June 23}}) – {{ill|Koxinga|en|Koxinga|WD=Q197615|lt=Zheng Chenggong}} (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born {{ill|1624|en|1624|WD=Q6821|lt=1624}}). * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1680|en|1680|WD=Q7642|lt=1680}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|WD=Q2627|lt=June 4}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|en|Tokugawa Ietsuna|WD=Q323422|lt=Tokugawa Ietsuna}}, the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born {{ill|1641|en|1641|WD=Q6907|lt=1641}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|7|5|9|4|8|6|5|0508|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōkyō|1=Shōryaku}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333|1=1333}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20|1=June 20}}) – {{ill|Nitta Yoshisada|en|Nitta Yoshisada|WD=Q1328796|lt=Nitta Yoshisada|1=Nitta Yoshisada}} launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1587|en|1587|WD=Q6744|lt=1587|1=1587}} {{ill|June 13|en|June 13|WD=Q2614|lt=June 13|1=June 13}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshihisa|en|Shimazu Yoshihisa|WD=Q955727|lt=Shimazu Yoshihisa|1=Shimazu Yoshihisa}} surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|WD=Q2627|lt=June 4|1=June 4}}) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初八]][[zh:五月初八]]
{{Not to be confused with|May 8|qq=May 8}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōkyō|1=Shōryaku}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333|1=1333}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20|1=June 20}}) – {{ill|Nitta Yoshisada|en|Nitta Yoshisada|WD=Q1328796|lt=Nitta Yoshisada|1=Nitta Yoshisada}} launched an attack in Ueno Province against the 【Hojo clan|北条氏】, marking the beginning of his campaign (citation needed). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1587|en|1587|WD=Q6744|lt=1587|1=1587}} {{ill|June 13|en|June 13|WD=Q2614|lt=June 13|1=June 13}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshihisa|en|Shimazu Yoshihisa|WD=Q955727|lt=Shimazu Yoshihisa|1=Shimazu Yoshihisa}} surrendered, leading to Toyotomi Hideyoshi’s conquest of Kyushu. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|WD=Q2627|lt=June 4|1=June 4}}) – During the Osaka Summer Campaign, Toyotomi Hideyori and his consort Yododen committed ritual suicide, marking the end of the Osaka Campaign and the extinction of the Toyotomi clan.
== Births == * ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|862|en|862|WD=Q24993|lt=862|1=862}} {{ill|June 8|en|June 8|WD=Q2621|lt=June 8|1=June 8}}) – {{ill|Emperor Xizong of Tang|en|Emperor Xizong of Tang|WD=Q9889|lt=Emperor Xizong|1=Emperor Xizong of Tang}}, the 18th Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (died {{ill|888|en|888|WD=Q563006|lt=888|1=888}}). * {{ill|Genbun|en|Genbun|WD=Q1145754|lt=Genbun|1=Genbun}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1737|en|1737|WD=Q6993|lt=1737|1=1737}} {{ill|June 6|en|June 6|WD=Q2620|lt=June 6|1=June 6}}) – {{ill|Katō Taikan|ja|加藤泰宦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Taikan|1=Katō Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11399357}}, the 5th lord of the 【Shintani Domain|新谷藩】 (died {{ill|1771|en|1771|WD=Q7686|lt=1771|1=1771}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōwa|en|Jōwa|WD=Q3577279|lt=Shōwa|1=Jōwa}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|840|en|840|WD=Q29936|lt=840|1=840}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|WD=Q2617|lt=June 11|1=June 11}}) – {{ill|Emperor Junna|en|Emperor Junna|WD=Q374136|lt=Junwa Tennō|1=Emperor Junna}}, the 53rd Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|786|en|786|WD=Q30307|lt=786|1=786}}). * {{ill|Chōtoku|en|Chōtoku|WD=Q1327213|lt=Chōtoku|1=Chōtoku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|995|en|995|WD=Q23794|lt=995|1=995}} {{ill|June 8|en|June 8|WD=Q2621|lt=June 8|1=June 8}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michikane|en|Fujiwara no Michikane|WD=Q366253|lt=Fujiwara Michikane|1=Fujiwara no Michikane}}, a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}}) (born {{ill|961|en|961|WD=Q23881|lt=961|1=961}}). * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1615, June 4) – Toyotomi Hideyori, son of Toyotomi Hideyoshi (born {{ill|1593|en|1593|WD=Q6772|lt=1593|1=1593}}). * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1615, June 4) – Yododen, consort of Toyotomi Hideyoshi and mother of Toyotomi Hideyori (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567|1=1567}}). * ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1662|en|1662|WD=Q7574|lt=1662|1=1662}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|WD=Q2668|lt=June 23|1=June 23}}) – {{ill|Koxinga|en|Koxinga|WD=Q197615|lt=Zheng Chenggong|1=Koxinga}} (also known as Koxinga), a key figure in the Ming loyalist movement (born {{ill|1624|en|1624|WD=Q6821|lt=1624|1=1624}}). * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1680|en|1680|WD=Q7642|lt=1680|1=1680}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|WD=Q2627|lt=June 4|1=June 4}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|en|Tokugawa Ietsuna|WD=Q323422|lt=Tokugawa Ietsuna|1=Tokugawa Ietsuna}}, the 4th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (born {{ill|1641|en|1641|WD=Q6907|lt=1641|1=1641}}).
